Resolve the PR commits for a single merge commit

Source: R/FetchAllMergeCommitSHAsLocal.R
ResolvePRCommits.Rd

Uses a pre-fetched commit log and index to find all commits reachable from the PR branch tip (parent2) but not from the target branch tip (parent1), without making additional git calls.

Usage

ResolvePRCommits(strMergeSHA, chrAllCommits, envCommitIndex, chrParents)

Arguments

strMergeSHA

(length-1 character) The merge commit SHA.

chrAllCommits

(character) Full ordered commit log (most recent first) as returned by GetGitLog().

envCommitIndex

(environment) Named environment mapping SHAs to positions in chrAllCommits, as built by BuildCommitIndexEnv().

chrParents

(character) Parent SHAs of the merge commit, as returned by BatchLookupCommitParents().

Value

A character vector of commit SHAs introduced by this PR.

On this page

Developed by Jeremy Wildfire, Jon Harmon, Natalia Andriychuk, Matt Roumaya.
